user_query: I want to surprise my partner with a romantic dinner at home. Can you suggest recipes for a three-course meal? Also, fetch the nutritional information for the ingredients. Additionally, retrieve the details of a specific product with the ID 32656173352.

TaskList.description: Search for three-course meal recipes suitable for a romantic dinner.
Fetch the nutritional information for the ingredients from the selected recipes.
Retrieve details of the product with ID 32656173352.
